speaker: speaker1
text: Hello , Miao Li , Where are you going ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Hello , I am going to the store to buy some fruit .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , Would you do me a favor ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Please mail this letter for me on your way to the store .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sure . Do you want it to be registered ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , I think so . There are some pictures in it . It would be a great pity if they were lost .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I will be glad to mail your letter .
